properties.body:
NAVARE XIX 51/22
 NORWEGIAN SEA
 1.ANDOYA SPACE WILL CONDUCT NAVAL ACTHIVITY  03 TO 05 APR 1900 TO 0200 UTC
 DANGER AREA 3:
 A.69-15.0N-014-31.0E
 B.69-52.0N-016-52.0E
 C.71-22.0N-016-28.0E
 D.70-16.0N-010-47.0E
 E.69-15.0N-014-31.0E
 2.MARIN TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THIS AREA.
 FOR COORDINATION ANDOYA SPACE CAN BE CONTACTED ON THELEPHONE 0047 761482 OR
 VHF CH 14/16 CALLSIGN RANGE SAFETY
 3. REFERS EFS 8-22
 4.CANCEL THIS MESSAGE 051900 UTC APR 22
